target.label: ED Classification
target.title: ED Classification DAG
target.subtitle: Lineage for the ED Classification data mart rooted at its public output models.
target.graphSubtitle: Lineage for the ED Classification data mart rooted at its public output models.

nodes.name: Encounter
nodes.description: The encounter table contains information about patients visits (i.e.  encounters).  This includes acute inpatient, emergency department, office  visits, SNF stays, etc.

columns.name: _dbt_source_relation
columns.description: dbt utils metadata column to indicate the source table from unioning tables together.

columns.name: encounter_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for each encounter in the dataset.

columns.name: person_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for each person in the dataset.

columns.name: patient_data_source_id
columns.description: Identifier for the source system from which patient data originated.

columns.name: encounter_type
columns.description: Indicates the type of encounter e.g. acute inpatient, emergency department, etc.

columns.name: encounter_group
columns.description: Categorization of the encounter into groups based on predefined criteria.

columns.name: encounter_start_date
columns.description: Date when the encounter started.

columns.name: encounter_end_date
columns.description: Date when the encounter ended.

columns.name: length_of_stay
columns.description: Length of the encounter calculated as encounter_end_date - encounter_start_date.

columns.name: admit_source_code
columns.description: Indicates where the patient was before the healthcare encounter (inpatient claims only).

columns.name: admit_source_description
columns.description: Description of the admit_source_code for the encounter.

columns.name: admit_type_code
columns.description: Indicates the type of admission (inpatient claims only).

columns.name: admit_type_description
columns.description: Description of the admit_type_code for the encounter.

columns.name: discharge_disposition_code
columns.description: Indicates the type of setting the patient was discharged to (institutional inpatient claims only).

columns.name: discharge_disposition_description
columns.description: Description of the discharge_disposition_code for the encounter.

columns.name: attending_provider_id
columns.description: ID for the attending provider on the encounter.

columns.name: attending_provider_name
columns.description: Name of the attending provider on the encounter.

columns.name: facility_npi
columns.description: Facility NPI for the claim (the organizational NPI of the facility where services were performed).

columns.name: facility_name
columns.description: Facility name.

columns.name: facility_type
columns.description: The type of facility e.g. acute care hospital.

columns.name: observation_flag
columns.description: Indicates whether the encounter was marked as an observation stay (1 for yes, 0 for no).

columns.name: lab_flag
columns.description: Indicates whether lab services were utilized during the encounter (1 for yes, 0 for no).

columns.name: dme_flag
columns.description: Indicates whether durable medical equipment (DME) was used during the encounter (1 for yes, 0 for no).

columns.name: ambulance_flag
columns.description: Indicates whether ambulance services were utilized during the encounter (1 for yes, 0 for no).

columns.name: pharmacy_flag
columns.description: Indicates whether pharmacy services were utilized during the encounter (1 for yes, 0 for no).

columns.name: ed_flag
columns.description: Indicates whether the encounter involved an emergency department visit (1 for yes, 0 for no).

columns.name: delivery_flag
columns.description: Indicates whether the encounter involved a delivery (1 for yes, 0 for no).

columns.name: delivery_type
columns.description: Type of delivery that occurred during the encounter, if applicable.

columns.name: newborn_flag
columns.description: Indicates whether the encounter was for a newborn (1 for yes, 0 for no).

columns.name: nicu_flag
columns.description: Indicates whether the newborn was admitted to the Neonatal Intensive Care Unit (NICU) during the encounter (1 for yes, 0 for no).

columns.name: snf_part_b_flag
columns.description: Indicates whether the inpatient medical service for Medicare covers under Part B or not. (1 for yes and 0 for no)

columns.name: primary_diagnosis_code_type
columns.description: The type of condition code reported in the source system e.g. ICD-10-CM.

columns.name: primary_diagnosis_code
columns.description: Primary diagnosis code for the encounter. If from claims the primary diagnosis code comes from the institutional claim.
columns.terminologyNote: **Note: this terminology set is too large to be loaded as a seed and is instead loaded from public cloud storage for supported adapters.

columns.name: primary_diagnosis_description
columns.description: Description of the primary diagnosis code.

columns.name: drg_code_type
columns.description: The DRG system used for the claim.

columns.name: drg_code
columns.description: The DRG code on the claim.

columns.name: drg_description
columns.description: The description for the DRG code used on the claim.

columns.name: paid_amount
columns.description: The total amount paid by the insurer.

columns.name: allowed_amount
columns.description: The total amount allowed (includes amount paid by the insurer and patient).

columns.name: charge_amount
columns.description: The total amount charged for the services provided, before any adjustments or payments. This is typically in US dollars.

columns.name: data_source
columns.description: User-configured field that indicates the data source.

columns.name: claim_count
columns.description: The number of claims associated with the encounter or record.

columns.name: inst_claim_count
columns.description: Number of institutional claims generated from the encounter.

columns.name: prof_claim_count
columns.description: Number of professional claims generated from the encounter.

columns.name: source_model
columns.description: Indicates the DBT source relation name from which data is derived.

columns.name: encounter_source_type
columns.description: Indicates whether the encounter is from a claims or clinical data source

columns.name: attending_provider_id
columns.description: ID for the attending provider on the encounter.

columns.name: attending_provider_name
columns.description: Name of the attending provider on the encounter.

columns.name: facility_npi
columns.description: Facility NPI for the claim (the organizational NPI of the facility where services were performed).

columns.name: facility_name
columns.description: Facility name.

columns.name: facility_type
columns.description: The type of facility e.g. acute care hospital.

columns.name: tuva_last_run
columns.description: The last time the data was refreshed. Generated by `dbt_utils.pretty_time` as the local time of the `dbt run` environment. Timezone is configurable via the `tuva_last_run` var.

nodes.name: Patient
nodes.description: The patient table contains demographic and geographic information on patients.

columns.name: person_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for each person in the dataset.

columns.name: sex
columns.description: The gender of the patient.

columns.name: race
columns.description: The patient's race.

columns.name: birth_date
columns.description: The birth date of the patient.

columns.name: death_date
columns.description: Date the patient died if there is one.

columns.name: death_flag
columns.description: A flag indicating if the patient has died.

columns.name: name_suffix
columns.description: The name suffixes (e.g., Sr., Jr., III.)

columns.name: first_name
columns.description: The first name of the patient.

columns.name: middle_name
columns.description: The middle name of the patient.

columns.name: last_name
columns.description: The last name of the patient.

columns.name: social_security_number
columns.description: The social security number of the patient.

columns.name: address
columns.description: The street address of the record (e.g., facility location, patient, etc).

columns.name: city
columns.description: The city of the record (e.g., facility location, patient, etc).

columns.name: state
columns.description: The state of the record (e.g., facility location, patient, etc).

columns.name: zip_code
columns.description: The zip code of the record (e.g., facility location, patient, etc).

columns.name: county
columns.description: The county for the patient.

columns.name: latitude
columns.description: The latitude of the record (e.g., facility location, patient, etc).

columns.name: longitude
columns.description: The longitude of the record (e.g., facility location, patient, etc).

columns.name: phone
columns.description: The phone number for the patient.

columns.name: email
columns.description: The email for the patient

columns.name: ethnicity
columns.description: The ethnicity of the patient

columns.name: age
columns.description: The age of the patient calculated based on their date of birth and the last time the tuva project was run.

columns.name: age_group
columns.description: The decade age group the patient falls into based on their calculated age.

columns.name: data_source
columns.description: User-configured field that indicates the data source.

columns.name: tuva_last_run
columns.description: The last time the data was refreshed. Generated by `dbt_utils.pretty_time` as the local time of the `dbt run` environment. Timezone is configurable via the `tuva_last_run` var.

nodes.name: ed_classification__stg_encounter
nodes.sql:
{{ config(
     enabled = var('claims_enabled', False)
 | as_bool
   )
}}

select
    encounter_id
    , encounter_type
    , person_id
    , encounter_end_date
    , facility_npi
    , primary_diagnosis_code_type
    , primary_diagnosis_code
    , primary_diagnosis_description
    , paid_amount
    , allowed_amount
    , charge_amount
from {{ ref('core__encounter') }}

nodes.name: ed_classification__stg_patient
nodes.sql:
{{ config(
     enabled = var('claims_enabled', False)
 | as_bool
   )
}}

select
    person_id
    , sex
    , birth_date
    , race
    , state
    , zip_code
    , latitude
    , longitude
    , data_source
from {{ ref('core__patient') }}

nodes.name: ed_classification__int_map_primary_dx
nodes.description: Map ED encounter primary dx to classification

nodes.name: ed_classification__int_filter_encounter_with_classification
nodes.description: Filter out ED visits that were not classified
nodes.sql:
/*
Filter conditions to those that were classified and pick the classification
with the greatest probability (that's the greatest logic). This logic removes
any rows that were not classified.
*/
{{ config(
     enabled = var('claims_enabled', False) | as_bool
   )
}}

select
   a.*
   , case greatest(edcnnpa, edcnpa, epct, noner, injury, psych, alcohol, drug)
          when edcnnpa then 'edcnnpa'
          when edcnpa then 'edcnpa'
          when epct then 'epct'
          when noner then 'noner'
          when injury then 'injury'
          when psych then 'psych'
          when alcohol then 'alcohol'
          when drug then 'drug'
          else 'unclassified'
   end as classification
from {{ ref('ed_classification__int_map_primary_dx') }} as a
where ed_classification_capture = 1

nodes.name: ed_classification__summary
nodes.description: ED Classification as a cube that can be summarized
nodes.sql:
{{ config(
     enabled = var('claims_enabled', False) | as_bool
   )
}}


select
    class.encounter_id
    , cat.classification_name as ed_classification_description
    , cat.classification_order as ed_classification_order
    , class.person_id
    , class.encounter_end_date
    , {{ concat_custom([date_part('year', 'class.encounter_end_date'),
                      dbt.right(
                      concat_custom(["'00'", date_part('month', 'class.encounter_end_date')])
                      , 2)]) }} as year_month
    , class.primary_diagnosis_code
    , class.primary_diagnosis_description
    , class.paid_amount
    , class.allowed_amount
    , class.charge_amount
    , class.facility_npi
    , fac_prov.provider_organization_name as facility_name
    , practice_state as facility_state
    , practice_city as facility_city
    , practice_zip_code as facility_zip_code
    , pat.sex as patient_sex
    , floor({{ datediff('pat.birth_date', 'class.encounter_end_date', 'hour') }} / 8766.0) as patient_age
    , zip_code as patient_zip_code
    , latitude as patient_latitude
    , longitude as patient_longitude
    , race as patient_race
    , pat.data_source
from {{ ref('ed_classification__int_filter_encounter_with_classification') }} as class
inner join {{ ref('ed_classification__categories') }} as cat
    on class.classification = cat.classification
left outer join {{ ref('provider_data__provider') }} as fac_prov
    on class.facility_npi = fac_prov.npi
left outer join {{ ref('ed_classification__stg_patient') }} as pat
    on class.person_id = pat.person_id

columns.name: encounter_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for the emergency_department encounter.

columns.description: The order of the classification.
